item.title: Papers I Read
item.description: Papers I Read Let’s start the first one: Programming Considered as a Human Activity

item.title: Reading List
item.description: Books # Book Title Author 1 Thinking, Fast and Slow Daniel Kahneman 2 Sokak Kodcusu Sedat Kapanoglu 3 Database Design and Implementation Edward Sciore 4 Understanding Software Dynamics Brendan Gregg 5 Kubernetes: Up and Running Kelsey Hightower, Brendan Burns, Joe Beda 6 The Elements of Computing Systems Noam Nisan, Shimon Schocken 7 Programming Elixir Dave Thomas 8 The Kubernetes Book Nigel Poulton 9 Zero To Production in Rust Luca Palmieri 10 Systems Performance Brendan Gregg 11 İstanbul Hatırası Ahmet Ümit 12 Martin Eden Jack London
